# Revuera
> Turn happy customers into 5-star Google reviews — automatically.

Revuera is an Australian SaaS that helps small businesses collect Google reviews through smart filtering. Unhappy customers (1–3★) get routed to private feedback; happy customers (4–5★) are sent directly to Google to leave a public review.

## Products

### Starter Plan ($19/mo or $15/mo annual)
SMS-based review collection for service businesses (trades, salons, clinics, restaurants).
- Customer receives an SMS after their visit
- Replies with a star rating (1–5)
- 4–5★: sent a link to leave a Google review
- 1–3★: asked for private feedback (never goes to Google)
- Dashboard: customer history, feedback inbox, CSV export

### Ecommerce Plan ($9/mo or $7/mo annual)
Review funnel page for online stores. No SMS required.
- Webhook integration with Shopify, WooCommerce, BigCommerce, Square
- 7-day delay after purchase before review request
- Branded funnel page (logo, colour, custom copy)
- QR code / direct link / post-checkout redirect
- Dashboard: funnel visits, positive/negative split, private feedback

## Key Features
- Smart filtering: negative feedback stays private
- Australian phone number normalisation
- PBKDF2 password hashing, session token auth
- Stripe billing with 7-day free trial
- Twilio SMS (AU numbers)
- Resend transactional email
- Built on Cloudflare Workers + Supabase
